query:
-- 添加缺失的列到university_normalization表
ALTER TABLE university_normalization 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS confidence DECIMAL(3,2) DEFAULT 0.95,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reasoning TEXT;

-- 添加缺失的列到major_normalization表
ALTER TABLE major_normalization 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS confidence DECIMAL(3,2) DEFAULT 0.95,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reasoning TEXT;

-- 修复user_input_history表的列名
ALTER TABLE user_input_history 
CHANGE COLUMN IF EXISTS normalization_id normalized_id INT;
